publishedAbstract: When deploying OpenShift Data Foundation(aka ODF) using the Openshift console, we can select specific nodes and label them with `cluster.ocs.openshift.io/openshift-storage= ''`, but if ODF is deployed using the command line interface(CLI), to label the nodes one has to do either of the following:- Create a custom machineset / modify existing machineset- Create kubernetes job with appropriate rbac to label the nodes- Manually label the nodes
publishedTitle: Allow automatic node selection for deploying OpenShift Data Foundation using labels
